---
title: "Something for fun!"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: false
---

### Interactive map

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(leaflet)
leaflet() %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addMarkers(lng=140.04844112274003, lat=35.64944872393974, popup="IDE-JETRO")
```

### Open social science now!

My dream is to make social science more open and accessible to everyone. Besides data collection and code replication, I hope to expand the polisci community and implement its insights in the real world.

Below are some of my attemtps to that end:

- [VN-Politicians](https://vn-politician.vercel.app/members): A dataset of Vietnamese national deputies.
- llm-research-pipelines: A Github repo of skills/workflows collection for coding agents usage (mostly Claude Code, for now).
  - I wrote a blog post on that in Japanese at [Qiita](https://qiita.com/ura8107/items/bfa7f94812e9594a3966).
